name: Medium Wood Crate Christmas Decorative Storage Bin Red - Brightroom™
description:
This Medium Wood Crate Decorative Storage Bin from Brightroom™ is great for keeping your space clutter-free. Made of wood, this red decorative storage bin adds a pop of color to your space, while the open top allows you to easily store and access the contents. Designed in a rectangular shape, this 2249.1-cubic-inch storage bin is great for keeping toys, books, small throws and more. Plus, it features cutout handles for easy portability.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
